---
name: 🎓 New Course Request
about: Suggest a new K-12 topic for TeachAny courseware
title: '[Course] '
labels: ['new-course', 'enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Course Information

**Subject**: (e.g., Math, Physics, Biology, Geography, History, etc.)
**Grade Level**: (e.g., Grade 7, Grade 10, etc.)
**Topic**: (e.g., Pythagorean Theorem, Photosynthesis, etc.)

## The 6 Pre-Design Questions

1. **Who are the students?** (Grade, baseline knowledge, common state)


2. **What are the prerequisites?** (What must they know before this lesson?)


3. **What should they be able to DO after?** (Observable behavior, not just "understand")


4. **What is the real-world scenario?** (Why should students care?)


5. **Where do students most commonly get stuck?** (Common errors, misconceptions)


6. **How do we verify they learned?** (Assessment approach)


## Suggested Interactions

- [ ] Canvas visualization
- [ ] Drag-and-drop sorting
- [ ] Parameter sliders
- [ ] Map/diagram annotation
- [ ] Experiment simulation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

(Any references, curriculum standards, or examples that might help)
